design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Play as James Bond Jr., nephew of the famous spy, in a side-scrolling action platformer adventure

difficulty.lives_system: Multiple lives; debug codes allow up to 99 lives via cheat passwords
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Cheat passwords (e.g., 181287, 170167, 200888) provide player-accessible difficulty modulation through unlimited ammo, grenades, and extended lives

progression.upgrade_system: Weapon/ammo collection system implied by cheat code references (grenades, glow power, ammunition)
progression.unlock_mechanism: Level progression; passwords enable access to debug features and credits
replayability_hooks: Secret passwords for sound test (012345) and credits (888888)
Debug cheat codes rewarding exploration of password system
Hidden developer credits accessible via password

world_building_techniques: Licensed IP (James Bond Jr. animated series adaptation) provides external narrative context
Hidden copyright messages and developer credits suggest authorial presence

sources_used: tcrf (The Cutting Room Floor - James Bond Jr. NES article)
